name: Orange Parfaits
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces vanilla or pineapple low-fat yogurt
Florida orange peel curls or wedges - optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pudding mix according to package directions, using the 1 3/4 cups of orange juice instead of milk.
2. Transfer pudding to a bowl and cover with plastic wrap.
3. Chill thoroughly in the refrigerator.
4. Before serving, gently fold in the yogurt.
5. Divide one-third of the pudding mixture among six glasses.
6. Sprinkle with half of the crushed cookies.
7. Repeat layers of pudding and cookie.
8. Top with remaining pudding mixture.
9. If desired, garnish with orange peel curls or wedges and mint.
Makes 6 servings (about 2/3 cup each).
